title: oryzopsis lateralis
intro: Oryzopsis lateralis, also known as Puccinellia nuttallii, is a species of grass native to North America. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oryzopsis lateralis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary tract issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
